title: Tower Command
description:
In the beginning, various sightings were reported of abnormal creatures roaming the countryside. Not long after, the creatures started to attack the villages and cities. Chaos quickly broke out as the packs of beasts grew to hordes. While the kingdoms are strained to survive, the mystery of who or what is behind this onslaught remains to be solved.

Tower Command is a tower defense with high level of strategy and tactics. Build towers to maximize bonuses and synergies to stop the waves.

Select a commander, towers, traits and items to fit your strategy. Each tower is unique and can give bonuses to nearby towers, so place them wisely. Try to survive as long as possible!

All towers are unique. They vary in attack behavior, many have special passives and abilities and can give various bonuses to nearby towers. Gain experience and upgrade your towers to maximize their effectiveness. Combine upgrades and bonuses in effective ways to create crazy combos!

During the game, you gain experience and can use this to upgrade your towers with a wide range of upgrades!

Certain towers have link bonuses. These bones applies to nearby towers. Decide where to place your towers to maximize the damage!

By playing you can complete various challenges to unlock new commanders, traits, items, towers and maps.

Items can be found during each run, some can provide global bonuses, some can be activated and some can be placed on towers to give them unique abilities.

There are multiple playable maps, each with a unique look and layout and enemies.

Enemies have dynamic pathfinding, so there is no fixed path they take to their goal. Use this to your advantage!

Build your defense from by choosing from a wide range of unique towers. Stop the enemies from reaching their destination. Placement is key!

Choose a strategy and survive as long as possible! Each run is different!

Each map has a final boss. But you can choose to keep playing after defeating this boss to continue in an "endless" mode where new waves will spawn to test how far you can really go!

Music: AlkaKrab
description_short: Strategic tower defense where you need to maximize your bonuses. Create your build, upgrade towers, link them, equip items to create ridiculous combos. Placement is key in this game, you decide the path enemies take to their goal. Explore all maps and unlock towers, commanders, traits and items.
